name: seoauditor
description: Read-only SEO and AI-visibility audit skill: audits how a codebase makes a website discoverable to search engines and AI answer engines across 12 dimensions (crawlability and indexation, rendering and content-in-HTML, on-page content and semantics, canonicalization, structured data, AI/generative-engine visibility, URL architecture and technical config, Core Web Vitals code signals, social metadata, internationalization, feeds and syndication, and SEO observability), writes a scored, prioritized seoaudit.md, and reports the verdict in chat. Works in both Claude Code (/seoauditor) and Codex ($seoauditor).
